title: Senior Revenue Manager at SOTC Travel

jsonLd.title: Senior Revenue Manager at SOTC Travel
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Revenue Manager with drive and ambition, SOTC Travel in Coimbatore is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About SOTC Travel:
SOTC Travel is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate housekeeping and maintenance for room readiness
• Ensure compliance with FSSAI, health, and safety regulations
• Train and supervise front-line staff on service standards
• Deliver exceptional guest experiences in line with brand standards
• Manage reservations and optimize room revenue through yield management
• Plan and execute banquets, events, and MICE functions
• Prepare daily operating reports and present to management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Hotel Management
• Proficiency in F&B Service
• Proficiency in Customer Relations
• Proficiency in Yield Management
• Proficiency in Housekeeping Standards
• Proficiency in GDS Systems
• Proficiency in Revenue Management
• Proficiency in Opera PMS

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Flexible working hours
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with SOTC Travel!
